meta.title: LexyFlow — Global compliance, automated.
meta.description: LexyFlow audits your documents against GDPR, the EU AI Act, LGPD and APPI in seconds — and delivers the report in any language. lexyflow.com

hero.title: LexyFlow: global compliance, automated.
hero.subtitle: Drop a policy, contract, or model card. LexyFlow cross-references it with GDPR, the EU AI Act, LGPD and APPI in seconds — and writes the report in your language.

multiPass.title: Multi-Pass engine
multiPass.body: LexyFlow audits in a canonical pivot language, then localizes the report into any BCP-47 language while keeping every legal citation verbatim.

zeroKnowledge.title: Encrypted at rest by default
zeroKnowledge.body: Your documents are AES-256-GCM encrypted server-side with per-organization keys, accessible only during your edit sessions, and never used to train AI models.

global.title: Global from day one
global.body: Six native languages, multi-currency Stripe checkout, automatic worldwide tax calculation, hreflang on every page.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay in your local currency. Taxes are calculated automatically.

starter.name: Starter
starter.tagline: For solo founders and small teams

reasons.no_credits: You need audit credits to launch a new audit. Choose a plan below to top up.
reasons.signin_required: Please sign in or create an account to subscribe.

audit.uploadHint: PDF, DOCX, MD or TXT — up to 25 MB. Files are deleted after analysis.
audit.targetLanguageHint: Choose any language — LexyFlow will translate the final report.
audit.running: LexyFlow is auditing — this usually takes under a minute.
audit.zeroKnowledge: Encrypted at rest: your document is stored AES-256-GCM encrypted and accessible only during your edit sessions.

processing.running: Auditing — this usually takes under a minute.
phases: Checking compliance against the selected frameworks…

failed.title: Audit failed
failed.timeout: The audit is taking longer than usual. Please retry.

auth.signInTagline: We'll email you a magic link. No password to remember.
auth.inboxBody: If your email is registered (or new), we just sent a sign-in link. The link is valid for 60 minutes.
auth.inboxRetry: Didn't receive it? Send another link
auth.errorService: The email service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
auth.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Welcome to LexyFlow.
onboarding.description: One-time setup. Tell us about your organisation so we can pick the right legal frameworks for your audits.
onboarding.reportLanguageHint: Reports default to this; you can override per audit.

billing.successBody: Your subscription is active. Stripe has emailed your receipt. We've provisioned your workspace — head to the audit page to upload your first document.
billing.creditsAdded: Audit credits added to your account
billing.creditsAvailable: {count, plural, one {# credit available} other {# credits available}}

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please retry in a moment.
errors.invalid_metadata: The audit form fields are incomplete or invalid.
errors.rate_limited: Too many audits in a short window — please wait and retry.
errors.no_credits: You're out of audit credits. Please choose a plan to continue.
errors.document_too_large_free_tier: Trial mode is limited to 2 MB per document. Upgrade to Pro to audit larger files.
errors.credit_check_failed: We couldn't verify your audit credits. Please retry.
errors.extraction_failed: We couldn't read this document. If it's a scanned PDF, please run OCR and try again.
errors.anthropic_error: The compliance engine is temporarily unavailable. Please retry.
errors.openai_error: The translation engine is temporarily unavailable. Please retry.
errors.multipass_failed: The audit pipeline ran into an unexpected issue. Please retry.
errors.supabase_write_failed: We couldn't save the report. Please retry.
errors.audit_stream_truncated: The connection was interrupted. Please retry.
errors.audit_no_stream: The server didn't send a response. Please retry.

report.title: Compliance audit report
report.noFindings: No findings recorded — your document is in good shape against the selected frameworks.
report.paywallTitle: {count, plural, one {# additional finding hidden} other {# additional findings hidden}}
report.paywallBody: Your free report shows the overall score and the first detected finding. Full analysis and the AI corrective editor are reserved for Pro and Enterprise customers.
report.paywallBenefit1: {count, plural, one {Access to the # hidden finding with full recommendations} other {Access to the # hidden findings with full recommendations}}
report.paywallBenefit2: AI editor to rewrite each non-compliant clause in one click
report.paywallBenefit3: AES-256-GCM encrypted storage + signed DPA + Trust Center
report.encryptedTooltip: Document stored encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Accessible only during your edit sessions.
report.footer: Generated by LexyFlow · lexyflow.com · audit id {id}

editor.title: Document editor
editor.intro: Paste the source text below, then apply AI recommendations directly to the document. Nothing is stored server-side.
editor.pastePlaceholder: Paste the content of your policy, contract or model card here…
editor.retainedNotice: Document loaded from encrypted storage (AES-256-GCM). The text only left the server during this session.
editor.noEvidenceAnchor: This finding isn't anchored to a specific clause in the document — apply the recommendation manually.

security.title: Security activity
security.intro: Every action that reads or destroys plaintext data from your organization is logged here. You see exactly when your documents are decrypted, by whom, and from which IP — including any LexyFlow support access.
security.promiseBody: This log is tamper-evident server-side (append-only table, Postgres RLS). We commit to never silently delete or alter a row.

trust.title: Security, encryption & compliance
trust.intro: Everything your legal team and CISO need to know before sending a document to LexyFlow. This page is the single source of truth — it is updated with every deploy.
trust.encryptionIvBody: 12 random bytes per document (GCM standard, never reused)
trust.encryptionTagBody: 16-byte GCM tag — any tampering of the ciphertext causes decryption to fail
trust.encryptionKeyBody: 256 bits, held by Vercel as an encrypted environment variable only. Never logged, never committed.
trust.encryptionAccessBody: Only during your authenticated edit sessions. Every decryption is recorded in your security activity log.
trust.subProcessorsIntro: Complete list of entities that process your data. You will be notified by email 30 days before any change to this list.
trust.commit30dBody: We email you before adding, removing or replacing a sub-processor. You have the right to terminate without penalty if the change does not suit you.
trust.commitDeleteBody: The 'Delete forever' button on each audit cascades a DELETE (audit + findings + ciphertext) and hands you an HMAC-SHA256 cryptographic receipt you can present to a regulator.
trust.commitTrainingBody: Your documents are never used to train an AI model — neither ours nor Anthropic's nor OpenAI's (zero data retention enabled on our API keys).
trust.commitBreachBody: In case of a detected data breach, we commit to notifying you within 24 hours, in line with GDPR Article 33.

dashboard.title: Audits
dashboard.emptyBody: Drop your first document to see findings here.
dashboard.creditsAvailable: {count, plural, one {# audit credit available} other {# audit credits available}}
dashboard.creditsLow: Add credits to run more audits
dashboard.freeBanner: Trial mode active. Upgrade to Enterprise to secure your documents.
